import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut max_val: Option<Int> = None
mut min_val: Option<Int> = None

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        match max_val
        when Some(m)
          if v > m
            max_val = Some(v)
          end
        when None
          max_val = Some(v)
        end
        match min_val
        when Some(m)
          if v < m
            min_val = Some(v)
          end
        when None
          min_val = Some(v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    match max_val
    when Some(m)
      if v > m
        max_val = Some(v)
      end
    when None
      max_val = Some(v)
    end
    match min_val
    when Some(m)
      if v < m
        min_val = Some(v)
      end
    when None
      min_val = Some(v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

match max_val
when Some(m)
  println("max=#{m}")
when None
  ()
end

match min_val
when Some(m)
  println("min=#{m}")
when None
  ()
end
